response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "RegisterPatient",
      "purpose": "Register a new patient in the system",
      "behavior": "Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, return success or error",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["patient registration", "data validation", "store patient"],
        "out_of_scope": ["appointment booking", "record retrieval", "profile update"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["input contains valid patient data"],
      "postconditions": ["patient is stored in patients data store"],
      "guarantees": ["patient ID is unique", "data is persisted"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with patient registration details", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "patients", "op": "read_write", "reason": "check uniqueness and store new patient"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success status, patient ID, and message", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def RegisterPatient(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "patients", "op": "read_write", "description": "check uniqueness and store new patient"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "patients", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "check uniqueness and store new patient"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["patients.read_write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "Patient ID must be unique"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "Patient is stored and returned ID is unique"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "BookAppointment",
      "purpose": "Book an appointment for a registered patient",
      "behavior": "Extract patient ID and appointment details, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment, return success or error",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["appointment booking", "patient existence check", "slot availability", "store appointment"],
        "out_of_scope": ["patient registration", "record retrieval", "profile update"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["patient is registered", "appointment slot is available"],
      "postconditions": ["appointment is stored in appointments data store"],
      "guarantees": ["appointment ID is unique", "no double booking"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with patient ID and appointment details", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [
        {"resource": "patients", "op": "read", "reason": "verify patient exists"},
        {"resource": "appointments", "op": "read_write", "reason": "check slot availability and store appointment"}
      ],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def BookAppointment(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "patients", "op": "read", "description": "verify patient exists"},
        {"variable": "appointments", "op": "read_write", "description": "check slot availability and store appointment"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "patients", "operation_type": "read", "description": "verify patient exists"},
        {"source_name": "appointments", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "check slot availability and store appointment"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["patients.read", "appointments.read_write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-002", "description": "Appointment slot must be available"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "Appointment is stored and no double booking occurs"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-002"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetRecords",
      "purpose": "Retrieve medical records for a patient",
      "behavior": "Extract patient ID, verify patient exists, fetch records from patients data store, return records or error",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["record retrieval", "patient existence check", "data fetch"],
        "out_of_scope": ["registration", "appointment booking", "profile update"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["patient is registered"],
      "postconditions": ["records are read without modification"],
      "guarantees": ["records are append-only, no modification"],
      "composition_role": "query",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with patient ID", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "patients", "op": "read", "reason": "verify patient exists and fetch records"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success status, records data, and message", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def GetRecords(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "patients", "op": "read", "description": "verify patient exists and fetch records"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "patients", "operation_type": "read", "description": "verify patient exists and fetch records"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["patients.read"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-003", "description": "Patient must exist"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-003", "description": "Records are returned for existing patient"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-003"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "UpdateProfile",
      "purpose": "Update patient profile information",
      "behavior": "Extract patient ID and updated fields, verify patient exists, update patient data store, return success or error",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["profile update", "patient existence check", "data update"],
        "out_of_scope": ["registration", "appointment booking", "record retrieval"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["patient is registered"],
      "postconditions": ["patient data is updated"],
      "guarantees": ["only specified fields are updated"],
      "composition_role": "mutate",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with patient ID and updated fields", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "patients", "op": "read_write", "reason": "verify patient exists and update profile"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success status and message", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def UpdateProfile(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "patients", "op": "read_write", "description": "verify patient exists and update profile"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "patients", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "verify patient exists and update profile"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["patients.read_write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-004", "description": "Patient must exist"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-004", "description": "Patient profile is updated successfully"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-004"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "governance_notes": "All children are pure functions with no side effects beyond data store operations. Resources are derived directly from internal_leaf_accesses. No global variables beyond data stores are needed. Constraints and acceptance criteria are minimal and aligned with pre/postconditions.",
  "resource_audit": {
    "signature_preservation_detail": "All signatures unchanged from Stage 2.",
    "internal_leaf_mapping_detail": "Each internal_leaf_accesses entry maps to a global_vars and data_operations entry with same resource and op.",
    "global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail": "For each child, global_vars and data_operations are identical in resource and op, ensuring synchronization.",
    "coverage_detail": "All resources (patients, appointments) used in internal_leaf_accesses are covered in global_vars and data_operations.",
    "final_status": "ok"
  }
